First Tracts Real Estate - Our Listings

Premier properties in Snowshoe, West Virginia

Allegheny Springs 1BR - Mountain View

$175,000
1 Bed | 1 Bath | 450 sqft | Allegheny Springs | Snowshoe Village
Beautiful 1-bedroom condo at Allegheny Springs with stunning mountain views across the valley. This cozy unit features a fully equipped kitchen, stone fireplace, and private balcony overlooking the ski area. Located in the heart of Snowshoe Village with easy access to restaurants, shops, and the ski lifts. Perfect weekend getaway or rental investment property. Mountain view across the parking lot facing the opposite side of the ski area.

Rimfire Lodge Studio - Ski-In/Ski-Out

$189,000
1 Bed | 1 Bath | 500 sqft | Rimfire Lodge | Snowshoe Village
Ski-in/ski-out studio at Rimfire Lodge with direct slope views. This efficiently designed unit maximizes every square foot with a Murphy bed, kitchenette, and modern bathroom. Wake up to panoramic views of the ski slopes right outside your window. Located steps from the Ballhooter lift and village amenities. Ideal for avid skiers who want first tracks every morning. Faces the ski area directly with unobstructed slope views.

Allegheny Springs 1BR - Updated Kitchen

$165,000
1 Bed | 1 Bath | 475 sqft | Allegheny Springs | Snowshoe Village
Recently renovated 1-bedroom condo at Allegheny Springs featuring a brand new kitchen with granite countertops and stainless steel appliances. The open living area leads to a spacious deck with mountain views. New flooring throughout and updated bathroom. Great location in Snowshoe Village with shuttle service to the slopes. Mountain view across the valley with gorgeous sunset vistas.

Silver Creek 2BR - Lake View

$245,000
2 Beds | 2 Baths | 850 sqft | Silver Creek Lodge | Silver Creek
Spacious 2-bedroom condo at Silver Creek with beautiful lake views. Features a master suite with ensuite bathroom, guest bedroom, and open concept living area. Community amenities include indoor pool, hot tub, and fitness center. Located at the Silver Creek area of the resort with its own ski terrain and golf course. Lake view with forest surroundings.

First Tracts Real Estate | Snowshoe, WV | (304) 555-0123
